globalNews.title: Trump confirms he asked Fifa to review Balogun ban
globalNews.summary: President Donald Trump confirms he asked Fifa to review United States striker Folarin Balogun's one-match suspension at the World Cup.

globalNews.title: Ukraine warns of interceptor missile shortage as 22 killed in Kyiv region
globalNews.summary: President Zelensky says Sunday's "massive Russian attack" on Kyiv consisted of 68 missiles and 351 strike drones.

globalNews.title: Huge crowds fill Tehran streets for Khamenei's funeral procession
globalNews.summary: Many people were waving Iranian flags and red banners symbolising vengeance for the former supreme leader's war death.

globalNews.title: Wildfire in southern France forces evacuation of 10,000 people
globalNews.summary: Tour de France organisers ban spectators from stage three as a wildfire hits the Pyrénées-Orientales region.

globalNews.title: 'I ate ketchup and cheese,' says Venezuelan girl trapped under quake rubble for 32 hours
globalNews.summary: Fabiana was trapped in the rubble of a 10-storey residential building after two earthquakes rocked Venezuela in June.

cryptoNews.title: Bitcoin price falls up to 4% on Strategy BTC sale as trader sees Summer 2022 repeat
cryptoNews.summary: Bitcoin wiped out much of its latest gains thanks to a market reaction to Strategy's 3,600 BTC sell-off, but analysis eyed a potential buy announcement in the coming days.

cryptoNews.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
cryptoNews.summary: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

cryptoNews.title: FCA warns of major shakeup as AI agents meet tokenized money
cryptoNews.summary: The FCA’s vision for agentic AI points toward a financial system where programmable money and tokenized assets could play a much larger role.

cryptoNews.title: Crypto hacks fell 47% in H1 but ecosystem is no safer: CertiK
cryptoNews.summary: Crypto exploits rose 59% quarter-on-quarter to $807.5 million in Q2, due partly to the KelpDAO and Drift Protocol exploits, which came at the hands of North Korean hackers.

cryptoNews.title: Strategy sells 3,588 Bitcoin for $216M to fund dividends, keeps $2.55B reserve intact
cryptoNews.summary: Strategy sold $216 million in Bitcoin to fund its dividend payments, as wealth manager Bernstein maintained its year-end Bitcoin price target of $150,000.

aiNews.title: Microsoft lays off nearly 5,000 employees across Xbox, commercial sales
aiNews.summary: Microsoft cut around 4,800 roles, or 2.1% of its global workforce, on Monday — the latest in a series of layoffs that’s stoking fears of AI replacing jobs. The layoffs will hit Xbox and commercial sal

aiNews.title: Station F ramps up as a launchpad for Europe’s hottest AI startups
aiNews.summary: Station F, a Paris-based startup hub founded by French billionaire Xavier Niel, is gearing up for a new edition of its F/ai accelerator program in a bid to strengthen its positioning as a stepping sto

aiNews.title: Amazon will stop accepting new customers for Mechanical Turk
aiNews.summary: These may be the last days of Amazon’s Mechanical Turk.

aiNews.title: New Google commercial imagines a Declaration of Independence written with help from AI
aiNews.summary: Two hundred and fifty years after the signing of the Declaration of Independence, a new commercial asks: What if the Founding Fathers had access to Google Workspace?

aiNews.title: Midjourney wants Hollywood studios to reveal the details of their AI usage
aiNews.summary: As part of an ongoing legal dispute with three Hollywood studios, Midjourney is seeking to compel those studios to reveal how they use AI themselves.
